allow: PowerShell(node --env-file=.env -e "import\('./src/db/courses.js'\).then\(async \(m\) => { await m.seedCoursesFromConfig\(\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('ERR:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

PowerShell($env:USE_TEST_COURSES = "true"; node --env-file=.env -e "import\('./src/db/courses.js'\).then\(async \(m\) => { const cfg = await import\('../upsc-bot/config/courses.test.config.js'\); console.log\('Test config has', cfg.default.length, 'courses with prices:', cfg.default.map\(c => '₹' + c.price\).join\(', '\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('ERR:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

PowerShell($html = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/sim" -UseBasicParsing; "GET /sim status: $\($html.StatusCode\)"; "HTML length: $\($html.Content.Length\) chars"; "Has 'Priya' title: $\($html.Content -match 'Priya'\)")
